recommendations.title: Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Jimmy Neutron is a boy genius and way ahead of his friends, but when it comes to being cool, he's a little behind. All until one day when his parents, and parents all over Earth are kidnapped by aliens, it's up to him to lead all the children of the

recommendations.title: The Ewok Adventure
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Wicket the Ewok and his friends agree to help two shipwrecked human children, Mace and Cindel, on a quest to find their parents.

recommendations.title: Wish Dragon
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Determined teen Din is longing to reconnect with his childhood best friend when he meets a wish-granting dragon who shows him the magic of possibilities.

recommendations.title: Drive Thru
recommendations.overview: A high-school student must save townspeople from a murderous clown who works at a fast-food place.

recommendations.title: The Boy Behind the Door
recommendations.overview: Bobby tries to save himself and his best friend when they are kidnapped on their way home from school.

recommendations.title: Doraemon: New Nobita's Great Demon - Peko and the Exploration Party of Five
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Nobita is followed by a stray dog on his way home and decides to help it find its original owner with the help of Doraemon. They find out that the dog is actually a prince in its homeland in Africa.

recommendations.title: Incredibles 2
recommendations.overview: Elastigirl springs into action to save the day, while Mr. Incredible faces his greatest challenge yet – taking care of the problems of his three children.

recommendations.title: Mia and the White Lion
recommendations.overview: A young girl from London moves to Africa with her parents where she befriends a lion cub.

recommendations.title: Expelled
recommendations.overview: Felix is a legendary prankster who gets expelled from his high school and, with his friend’s help, stops at nothing to hide it from his parents.

recommendations.title: The Price of Family
recommendations.overview: Heartbroken that their children no longer want to spend time with them, two parents fake an inheritance to bring the family together for Christmas.
